主角非圣母，慎入）
“你是否厌倦平凡，又是否渴望力量？
如果你想摆脱平凡，拥有凌驾于众生之上的力量，那么就来加入这场游戏吧。”
叶霜落被神秘游戏选中成为预备玩家。
作为玩家，他要面对的是来自其他平行时空与多元宇宙的外服玩家。
好在叶霜落觉醒了专属天赋：“成就大师”，只要达成一系列成就，就可以获得无数强悍的技能与属性。
当跨服战争开启，外服玩家们踏过时空门来到蓝星，叶霜落立于星海之上，一刀斩出。
浩瀚无双的刀气瞬间斩灭了所有前来入侵的敌人，面对时空门的另一侧无数惊骇恐惧的敌人，叶霜落叹了口气，悠悠道：
“其实我只想静静的刷成就，为什么要逼我呢？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0194a43a39556343d613e07c724e787a","author":"洛阳又起风了","author_id":"","book_id":"7151038657070107656","book_name":"全球游戏：我只想静静的刷成就","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#580808","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7197769119994675724","read_count":"57802","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1273646"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"470","tags":"游戏体育,穿越,网游,无女主,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o2cda3435b90ec0d2fd946cedaaedf00e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779179854&x-signature=JVbBJEjgaXWm660nFPaNXLCDobc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2013958995185127","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.0780691e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320163734FD3D38A4DD1C06B17587"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10780,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":6492},"user_action":{"a
